title: Piccadilly Greetings Mother's Day Card, Sending Love on Mother's Day - 8 x 6 inches
features: A High Quality Mother's Day Greeting Card and Envelope From Piccadilly Greetings
Designed and made in the UK - supporting British jobs
description: From the manufacturer Welcome to Piccadilly Greetings - a UK publisher and manufacturer of greeting cards Our cards are Designed and Made in the UK. Piccadilly Greetings Group has been printing and supplying high quality greeting cards for over 30 years. Our product range extends over 5,000 designs of cards, giftwrap and social stationery all of which is designed, manufactured and warehoused in Hemel Hempstead, UK. All our cards are high quality, beautifully produced and come with an envelope. #PiccadillyGreetings Gold Dust range Cute Happy Hugs range Male Cards With Love range Hundreds of Christmas Cards Father's Day, Mother's Day and Easter Cards Beautiful Giftwrap sheets Stationery for all your needs 1000s of beautifully designed cards to choose from! Across a variety of styles and sizes!
